'''dodapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upbraiding|upbraiding]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upbraiding|upbraiding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dodapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodapithi|dodapithi]] || [[word:dodapiji|dodapiji]] || [[word:dodapishi|dodapishi]] || [[word:dodapiki|dodapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodaputhuthu|dodaputhuthu]] || [[word:dodapujuju|dodapujuju]] || [[word:dodapushushu|dodapushushu]] || [[word:dodapukuku|dodapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodaputhu|dodaputhu]] || [[word:dodapuju|dodapuju]] || [[word:dodapushu|dodapushu]] || [[word:dodapuku|dodapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodapufthuf|dodapufthuf]] || [[word:dodapufjuf|dodapufjuf]] || [[word:dodapufshuf|dodapufshuf]] || [[word:dodapufkuf|dodapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodapethe|dodapethe]] || [[word:dodapeje|dodapeje]] || [[word:dodapeshe|dodapeshe]] || [[word:dodapeke|dodapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodapothotho|dodapothotho]] || [[word:dodapojojo|dodapojojo]] || [[word:dodaposhosho|dodaposhosho]] || [[word:dodapokoko|dodapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodapotho|dodapotho]] || [[word:dodapojo|dodapojo]] || [[word:dodaposho|dodaposho]] || [[word:dodapoko|dodapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodapofthof|dodapofthof]] || [[word:dodapofjof|dodapofjof]] || [[word:dodapofshof|dodapofshof]] || [[word:dodapofkof|dodapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfthÃŸf|dodapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfjÃŸf|dodapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfshÃŸf|dodapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfkÃŸf|dodapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dodapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dodapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dodapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dodapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfthÃŸf|dodapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfjÃŸf|dodapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfshÃŸf|dodapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfkÃŸf|dodapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfthÃŸf|dodapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfjÃŸf|dodapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfshÃŸf|dodapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dodapÃŸfkÃŸf|dodapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodapÃḊthÃḊ|dodapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dodapÃḊjÃḊ|dodapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dodapÃḊshÃḊ|dodapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dodapÃḊkÃḊ|dodapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodapathatha|dodapathatha]] || [[word:dodapajaja|dodapajaja]] || [[word:dodapashasha|dodapashasha]] || [[word:dodapakaka|dodapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodapatha|dodapatha]] || [[word:dodapaja|dodapaja]] || [[word:dodapasha|dodapasha]] || [[word:dodapaka|dodapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodapafthaf|dodapafthaf]] || [[word:dodapafjaf|dodapafjaf]] || [[word:dodapafshaf|dodapafshaf]] || [[word:dodapafkaf|dodapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dodapasha|dodapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodapshÃḋsha|dodapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodaprosha|dodaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodapmusha|dodapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodapyasha|dodapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododapnkshÃḋsha|gododapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododapnkrosha|gododapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododapnkmusha|gododapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododapnkyasha|gododapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dodadapasha|dodadapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodadapshÃḋsha|dodadapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodadaprosha|dodadaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodadapmusha|dodadapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodadapyasha|dodadapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododadapnkshÃḋsha|gododadapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododadapnkrosha|gododadapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododadapnkmusha|gododadapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododadapnkyasha|gododadapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dedÃḊpasha|dedÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dedÃḊpshÃḋsha|dedÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dedÃḊprosha|dedÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dedÃḊpmusha|dedÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dedÃḊpyasha|dedÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godedÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|godedÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godedÃḊpnkrosha|godedÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godedÃḊpnkmusha|godedÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godedÃḊpnkyasha|godedÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dodfapasha|dodfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodfapshÃḋsha|dodfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodfaprosha|dodfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodfapmusha|dodfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodfapyasha|dodfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododfapnkshÃḋsha|gododfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododfapnkrosha|gododfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododfapnkmusha|gododfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododfapnkyasha|gododfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
